ui.railCopy: Nutrition and movement that move with your hormones — personalised to exactly where you are in your cycle, every day.
ui.loginSub: Pick up right where you left off.
ui.signupSub: A minute now — tailored guidance for every day after.
ui.obRailCopy: A few quick questions so every recommendation fits your body — not an average.
ui.obDateNote: Not sure? Your best guess is fine — Nutri refines it as you log.
ui.obOptional: Optional — skip anything you’d rather not share.
ui.obAgree: I agree to the Privacy Policy & Terms, and understand my data stays mine.
ui.obErr: Could not save — check your connection and try again.
ui.gateSubMood: One honest word — Nutri tunes today’s plan around it.
ui.allsetCopy: Nutri is personalising your nutrition and movement from your answers. You can update them anytime in Settings.
ui.firstRunRest: Your Cycle Alignment Score unlocks after 7 days of logging — Nutri is already personalising from your answers.
ui.deviceNote: Nightly sync arrives with the mobile beta — your reads consent is already set.
ui.welcomeInsight: Welcome! Your first insight arrives tomorrow, once Nutri has a day of you in the picture.
ui.mvAlt: Swap for a 20-minute walk and gentle stretch — consistency beats intensity, every phase.
ui.prCopyDemo: Nutrition, movement and sleep are pulling in the same direction as your hormones.
ui.prCopyLive: Five component scores — phase confidence, biomarkers, nutrition, fitness and consistency — update with every log.
ui.brewCopy: Log for 7 days and Nutri will chart your Cycle Alignment Score, energy patterns and phase history here.
ui.connIntro: NutriSync reads only what you allow — and never writes back.
ui.whatReadsDesc: Applies to every connected device. Toggle a metric off to stop syncing it.
ui.encCopy: Device data augments your logs — it never silently overrides what you enter yourself. Disconnect anytime; your synced history stays yours.
ui.connectCopy: NutriSync will read the following to sharpen your phase detection and Cycle Alignment Score:
ui.connectNoteA: Read-only. NutriSync never writes back to
ui.privIntro: You own your data. Control what’s used, and take it with you anytime.
ui.delNote: Deletion is permanent and completes within 30 days.
ui.twofaOff: Off · we recommend turning this on
ui.signOutOthers: Sign out of all other sessions
ui.noteCreds6: Enter your email and a password (6+ characters).
ui.noteConfirm: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.
ui.alertDemoExport: Demo mode — connect the backend to export real data.
ui.alertConfirmDelete: Delete your account and all data? This cannot be undone.
ui.alertDeleted: Your data has been deleted. Sign-in record removal completes within 30 days.
ui.alertDeactivate: During beta, deactivation is handled by support — email hello@nutrisynccollective.com.
ui.alertDemoAccount: Demo mode — account actions need the live backend.
ui.welP: You are here because your body deserves better than guesswork. Lets sync your nutrition and movement to your natural rhythm.

menstrual.headline: Rest is productive.
menstrual.copy: Hormones are at their lowest ebb — warm, iron-rich food and gentle movement rebuild you from day one.
menstrual.focus: iron, folate & warm comfort foods to replenish.
menstrual.nlWhy: Bleeding draws down iron and magnesium. Warm, cooked meals digest easily while your body does its heaviest work of the month.
menstrual.insight: Energy is at its monthly low — protect your evenings and let sleep do the repair work.
menstrual.moveCopy: Recovery day — restorative yoga or a slow walk.
menstrual.mvCopy: Movement should feel like a warm bath today — circulation without strain.
mealWhy: Iron starts replacing what bleeding draws down.
Folate and iron rebuild your blood supply.

follicular.headline: Energy rising — build gently.
follicular.copy: Estrogen is climbing. Fresh, light meals and progressive training land best this week.
follicular.sideNote: Energy is ramping up this week
follicular.focus: vitamin C, lean protein & iron as energy ramps.
follicular.nlWhy: In your follicular phase estrogen rebuilds — iron restores what your period used, and vitamin C doubles its absorption.
follicular.insight: Estrogen is climbing — learning sticks faster and training builds more muscle this week. Stack the hard things now.
follicular.moveCopy: Energy is building — brisk walk + light core.
follicular.mvCopy: Build gradually as estrogen rises — rhythm over intensity today.
mealWhy: Vitamin C boosts iron absorption as energy ramps.
Protein fuels rising estrogen’s muscle-building window.
Iron rebuilds stores after your period.

ovulatory.headline: Peak power, peak confidence.
ovulatory.copy: Estrogen is at its highest — chase a personal best, book the hard conversation, and fuel with zinc & antioxidants.
ovulatory.focus: zinc, antioxidants & omega-3s to support ovulation.
ovulatory.nlWhy: Around ovulation your body runs hotter and burns through micronutrients faster. Zinc supports the LH surge; antioxidants protect the egg’s journey.
ovulatory.insight: Estrogen peaks today — confidence and social energy are at their highest. Schedule the big conversation.
ovulatory.moveCopy: Peak power day — HIIT or heavy lifts.
ovulatory.mvCopy: Your body recovers fastest right now — push intensity today, you’ve earned the ceiling.
mealWhy: Zinc supports the LH surge around ovulation.
B6 + fibre help clear peaking estrogen.

luteal.headline: Steady fuel, softer edges.
luteal.copy: Progesterone is in charge — steady blood sugar and magnesium keep energy and mood level through the wind-down.
luteal.focus: magnesium, B6 & slow carbs to steady the wind-down.
luteal.nlWhy: Progesterone raises your metabolic rate about 5% — steady, slow-burning meals prevent the dips that read as cravings.
luteal.insight: Serotonin dips as progesterone rises — a magnesium-rich dinner and an early night change how tomorrow feels.
luteal.moveCopy: Moderate & steady — strength or a hilly walk.
luteal.mvCopy: Keep bar speed smooth and rests generous — consistency over ceiling this week.
mealWhy: B6 supports serotonin as progesterone rises.
Slow carbs level the blood-sugar dips behind cravings.
Magnesium eases tension and readies deep sleep.

mob.whereBased: And finally, where are you based?
mob.lastPeriodStart: When did your last period start?
mob.startOverBody: This clears your answers so far and takes you back to the first step.
mob.boostsScore: Each one boosts your cycle sync score
mob.c1Body: How sure we are about your current phase. This gets stronger the more consistently you log your cycle dates. Keep your period start/end current in Calendar, and confidence builds automatically as you complete full cycles.
mob.c2Body: How well your logged signals match your expected phase patterns. Log Energy Stability, Mood, and PMS Symptoms daily — accuracy (and this score) improves as you complete more full cycles.
mob.c3Body: Based entirely on your Nutri Basics checklist. Keep checking off your daily items to hold it at full marks.
mob.c4Body: Movement is pass/fail: logging just one exercise in a day earns full credit. Log at least one Movement Log entry daily to close the gap. No need for more than one.
mob.c5Body: Tracks how consistently you're logging overall, separate from your checklists. Add more Meal Log and Movement Log notes. Consistency matters more than volume here.
mob.checkOffEat: Check off what you eat today
mob.checkOffMove: Check off your movement for today
mob.cycleRecalc: Changing the cycle start recalculates your phase and daily guidance immediately.
mob.cycleRestarted: A new cycle has started from the date you picked. Your averages now use your real cycle lengths.
mob.dietOtherPh: Tell us the plan you follow…
mob.feedbackLead: Tell us what to improve — every message goes straight to the founders.
mob.feedbackThanks: Thank you! Your feedback reached the team.
mob.firstCycleNote: Comparisons unlock after your first full cycle
mob.insightPhase: Your alignment is strongest in your
mob.logToBuild: Log your day to build today's score
mob.mealHint: Write down what you ate and any notes you'd like to keep
mob.mealPlaceholder: e.g. Lentil salad with spinach and walnuts…
mob.mealRecorded: Your meal has been recorded and counts toward today.
mob.moreDataSoon: More data points coming as you log
mob.moveHint: Write down what exercise you did and any notes you'd like to keep
mob.movePlaceholder: e.g. 30-min brisk walk along the river, felt great…
mob.noAutoRestart: Cycles only restart when you log a period — never automatically, even past day 28.
mob.noMatches: No phases match — history builds as you log.
mob.noMealsYet: No meals logged yet — your history builds here as you log.
mob.noMovesYet: No movement logged yet — check off activities or log a session.
mob.resent: Sent again — give it a minute (and check spam).
mob.unlockMonthly: Keep syncing to see your monthly trends
mob.unlockWeekly: Weekly trends unlock after your first full cycle
mob.unlockYearly: Keep syncing to unlock yearly insights
mob.verifyLead: We sent an activation link to
mob.verifyLead2: Open it to activate your account, then log in.
mob.workoutRecorded: Your workout has been recorded and counts toward today.

ob.accurate: Be as accurate as possible so NutriSync can give you tailored results.

cycleLength.q: How long is your average menstrual cycle?
cycleLength.h: From the first day of one period to the first day of the next.

periodLength.q: How many days does your period usually last?

healthCondition.q: Have you ever been diagnosed with any of the following conditions?

contraceptives.d: Such as the pill, hormonal IUD, implant, patch or ring. It changes your natural cycle, so Nutri adapts to it accordingly.
contraceptives.dh: the pill, hormonal IUD, implant, patch or ring.

opt.yes_sub: I'm using a hormonal method right now
opt.past_sub: I've used one before, but not anymore

nutritionDiet.q: Do you follow any specific nutrition plan?

opt.more_stable_energy_throughout_my_cycle: More stable energy throughout my cycle

beta.sub: Welcome to the NutriSync beta! You're among the first to try it. A few onboarding questions help us shape what's coming next, so some features are still on the way.
beta.info: Your feedback directly guides what we build. Spot something? Tap

period.h: This is the single most important answer — it's how we work out your phase each day.

city.h: This helps NutriSync localise tips and get a better understanding of you!

consent.sub: We only collect what's needed to personalise your cycle guidance.
consent.p1d: To sync meals and movement to your phase.
consent.p3d: Encrypted, never sold, deletable any time.
consent.agree2: , and consent to the processing of my health data to personalise my guidance.
consent.research: Use my anonymised data to improve NutriSync and women's health research.

done.sub: Nutri has built your first phase plan from your answers. Your personalised nutrition & movement guidance is ready.
done.note: You can update these answers anytime in Settings.
